summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Udaipur Wildlife Sanctuary website after fixes from iteration_1. All critical functionality is now working perfectly. The previously identified issues with menu overlay and FAQ toggle have been successfully resolved. All interactive elements, popups, and responsive design features are functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Menu overlay opens when clicking hamburger icon in header (FIXED from iteration_1)
Menu overlay opens when clicking hero MENU button (FIXED from iteration_1)
Menu overlay closes with X button properly
FAQ toggle functionality works - clicking FAQ questions expands/collapses answers (FIXED from iteration_1)
Entry ticket popup opens and closes correctly
Boating popup opens and closes correctly
EV popup opens and closes correctly
EV Cart +/- buttons update quantity and total correctly (₹20 base price)
All-in-One Booking +/- buttons work correctly, total updates without NaN errors
Desktop layout is responsive with 1200px max-width container
Mobile layout stacks sections properly in column layout
No horizontal overflow at any viewport size (tested 1920px, 1200px, 768px, 390px)
Responsive grid layouts work correctly: 2-column mobile, 3-column desktop for facilities
Gallery grid responsive: 2-column mobile, 4-column desktop
Booking wrapper responsive: stacked mobile, side-by-side desktop
All critical sections present and visible
Navigation functions work (scroll to location)
No JavaScript errors detected
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Hero section with background image and controls renders properly
Boating section with 3 boat cards displays correctly
Attractions section shows proper grid layout
Location section with timing and map displays correctly
Rules and FAQ sections display properly
Footer layout working correctly
